description_long: This object is a set of three tall, rectangular lockers joined side by side, commonly found in urban environments such as schools, gyms, or public facilities. Each locker features a vented panel near the top, likely for airflow, and a rectangular label area above and below the vent. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a light gray color and subtle orange accent lines around the vents and labels. The sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the modular, utilitarian design. The top of the lockers is flat and slightly recessed, possibly to prevent items from being placed on top. The overall construction suggests durability and security, suitable for storing personal belongings in public or semi-public spaces.
description: A set of three tall, gray metal lockers with vented panels and orange accent lines, designed for secure storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three adjacent lockers with vented panels and label areas.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, featureless profile of the lockers.
description_view_2: Identical to view 0, showing the front of the lockers with vents and labels.
description_view_3: Identical to view 1, showing the flat side profile.
